== Snail Codes ==
Snail Codes are code phrases released by the official Super Snail team on various social media sites that give specific rewards in celebration of different things. To enter a Snail Code, go to Settings > Snail Code. Check the [[Super Snail Wiki|Main Page]] for links to official social accounts!

Up to 50 Snail Codes can be put in at one time, each on a different line. Snail Codes must be entered in ALL CAPS to ensure they properly work. Starting soon, this page will list Snail Codes in order of their approximate expiration date. If any codes don't work or are expired, please let us know on the discord in the #wiki-gg channel!

== Active Snail Codes ==
<span id="last-updated-text"></span>

=== Approximate Expiration March 22, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250322" lang="berry">
CHILL SNAIL
IN YOUR FRIDGE
SNEWCHAPTER
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250322}}

=== Approximate Expiration March 17, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250317" lang="berry">
BLESSINGS
CHEERS
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250317}}

=== Approximate Expiration March 01, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250315" lang="berry">
ITSCOLDOUTSIDE
DECKTHEHALLS
ALLUNEED
ISSNAIL
SNEWYEAR2025
SMOTIVATION
RESNOLUTIONS
SNEWBEGINNING
SNAIL GAMES
SNURVIVE
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250315}}

=== Approximate Expiration March 09, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250309" lang="berry">
BTWATCHOUT
BTNOTCRY
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250309}}

=== Approximate Expiration March 08, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250308" lang="berry">
GOOD LUCK
SUCCESS
HAPPINESS
HEALTH
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250308}}

=== Approximate Expiration March 03, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250303" lang="berry">
HAPPY SNEWYEAR
SNEWYEAR
REDDIT101
JAN ROADMAP
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250303}}

=== Approximate Expiration February 28, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250228" lang="berry">
SUPER CELL
FEELSXMASMAN
FEELSWINTERMAN
MERRYXMAS
TO BOO
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250228}}

=== Approximate Expiration February 20, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250220" lang="berry">
IT IS TIME
FOR XMAS
MERRY CHRISTMAS
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250220}}

=== Approximate Expiration February 16, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250216" lang="berry">
YIPPEE KIYAY
BILLIE WILLIS
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250216}}

=== Approximate Expiration February 5, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250205" lang="berry">
POWER OF GOD
AND ANIME
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250205}}

=== Approximate Expiration February 4, 2025===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20250204" lang="berry">
DEC BUGS
REDDIT 1
REDDIT 2
REDDIT 3
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20250204}}

=== Approximate Expiration Unknown ===
<syntaxhighlight id="unknown_20231028_" lang="berry">
GREEDISGOOD
SLICE OF LIFE
TURTLE ON A HOT SHELL!
ENJOY THE SNAIL CODES!
</syntaxhighlight>
{{CopyText|unknown_20231028_}}

== Expired Snail Codes ==
<syntaxhighlight lang="berry">
10/10
10x draw
2023
Ahh
Answer:
Antennae
Are
Art
Assassin
Bacon
Cats
Coconut water
Comment
Community
Craft
Dogs
Doing
Down
Eggs
Engage
Equipment
Follow
Game survey
Glass
Going
Google play store
Great
Herbivor
Hibernation
Ice
Incentive
Incognito
In-game mail
Invertebrate
Join
July
June
Keep
Ketchup
Left
May
Meat
Meet
Moisture
Mollusk
Mucus
Oat milk
Oof
Open beta
Q&A Session
Question:
SHARE
Slime
Slimy
SNAIL FORCE ONE
Snail's pace
Social media
SPIN
Spiraled
SPIRALING
SUBSCRIBE
SUMMER
Super duper awesome reward
TENTACLES
Top picks
Trail
UP
Walkthrough recruitment
Weight lifting
Wow
OPINION
PERSPECTIVE
PLASTIC
POWER
QUICKLY
REACT
RICE
RIGHT
RNG SKILL
ROLL
SALAD
SAVE
SEASON
SHARE
SLOW MOVING
SLOWLY
SNAL4LYFE
VISITOR
WATER
YOU
ROCKET PARTY
PRIMATE PARTY
ITS BANANAS
FREE STUFF ALERT
INCITE CHAOS
SNAIL JOURNEY
double helix dna
snailgram
memories
ytumbo
launch day
countdown
BIG GUY PARK
PRE-REGISTRATION
SNAIL PAD
LIVE LAUGH SLIME
RTBMB7
LIVESTREAM
NEW HIRE
CACOPHONY
CATHAY DOMAIN
CLAY
DIVINE JADEN
ESCARGATOIRE
GASTROGALAXY
GASTRO-GLEE
GIVEAWAYS
GUESTHOUSE
INTERSNAILER
MILESTONE
MOLLUSK MADNESS
MONKEY MAYHEM
MUREX
NEW CONTRACTOR
OCTOSNAIL
POD PESOS
PTEROPOD
SHELL CREAM
SPACE SNAIL
SNAIL MAIL
ODYSSEY
GOLDEN FINGER
GOLDEN WHEAT
WHORL
BIVALVE
BOSS MONKEY
CARAMEL
CLAM UP
CONCHOLOGY
COWRIE
DECORATIVE
IMPOSTERS
JUSTATHANKYOU
NACRE
NAUTILUS
OPERCULUM
RADULA
SCUTE
SEA WHELK
SHELLSHOCKED
SHELL-CATION
SHELL-ETARIAN
SHINING SLIME
SLOW-BLOOMING
SLUGGISH
SNAIL CAVIAR
SNAIL CHOWDER
SNAIL EGGS
SNAIL SOUP
SNAILNADO
SNAILWART
SNUPPORTER
404
ACHIEVEMENT
HIGHLIGHT
BENCHMARK
WALLPAPER
SWEEPSTAKES
NEBULA PACK
SNAIL DUST
CELESNAIL
YUMMY
TOP1
FIRST
SECOND
THIRD
VIP000
VIP111
VIP222
VIP333
VIP444
VIP555
VIP666
VIP777
VIP888
VIP999
SNAIL ADVENTURE
SUPER SNAIL GAME
GGG 2023
SNAILCORD
YTOBMH
SNAILTOK
SNAIL TRAIL
PRE-ORDER
SNAIL CODE
TW7P7G
IGDSAQ
YTNX5W
REACT TO VOTE
FB2Z4G
MOONLIGHT
ROCKETSHIP
SNAIL ID
SNAIL PALS
SNAILBOOK
STARLIGHT
BLAZER
MUTATED
SNAILZER
BLAZING SNAILS
CHAN-HEE
MERCY
ENTERTAINED
IMPRISONED
RELEASE
SNAIL FRIENDS
SHELLTUBE
BETASNAILS
SNAPOCALYPSE
KEEP CALM AND SNAIL ON 
DEMONIC INTERVENTION
ONE PUNCH
TWO PUNCH
THREE PUNCH
FOUR PUNCH
FIVE PUNCH
SIX PUNCH
SEVEN PUNCH
EIGHT PUNCH
NINE PUNCH
TEN PUNCH
ONE KICK
TWO KICK
GODDESS
MISCHEVIOUS
GASTROGRANDPA
YOUNG AGAIN
SHELL GARDEN
ENHANCEMENT INJECTION
WRENCH
JETPACK
MISSILES
COUNTDOWN EVENT
VIP SILVER CARD
REBUILDING
SHIBA NINJU
SHIBA HOODLE
COMPASS
500000
SUCKER MOSQUITO
PET PIG
TURTLE NINJAS
PUPPERS
SNUPPIES
DOG FUSION
AIRCRAFT
MUSEUM
GOLD SNAIL
SILVER SNAIL
TARAOAMON
LEE GIN-NA
BRONZE SNAIL
SNAIL HYDRA
HYDRA SNAIL
VOTE NOW
DISCORD POLL
FROG PROBLEM
FUNGUS BASKET
HUSKY
POODLE
SHIBA INU
LAUNCHSTREAM
THANK YOU
THANKS FOR BEING HERE ENJOY THE SNAILVERSE
THE ANALECTS
SNAIL MODE: ACTIVATED!
BEING
THE UNISPARK
HOUMUWU DING
MAGELLAN'S TELESCOPE
WISH COIN
HERE
RELICS
LEAF OF YGGDRASIL
ENJOY
FACEBOOK EVENT
THANKS
FOR
MECHA HITMAN
HITMAN
SNAILVERSE
KIM CHI-YUM
JIRO TOYATO
SHELLBOAT
TURTLE IN A SHELLBOAT
VOYAGER 1
SHOWCASE
SOMERSAULT CLOUD
LEEKU
THE
LAUNCH PARTY
TURTLE SPEED
CHICHUKAKA
GHOST ZADAKO
MINION
PARTNER
PRINCE NERD
PROMETHEUS TORCH
TELESCOPE
YOUR HOME GAIA
ORANGE
KEMET
NETHRONE
LOOSE
GOOSE
SNACK-O-LANTERN
SNOCUS POCUS
LOTUS
SNFT
PRAISERNG
THRASHER
SHINING SNAIL
TREAT OR TRICK
SNALDUR'S GATE
NATURAL 20
DNA OF THE SOUL
MONSNOON
SNAILMAIL
RNGESUS
BLAST
PAST
CELL
DWELLER
LOVE FROM DEV
ESCARGOT-ING PLACES
HALLOWEEN NIGHT
HW777
HALLOWEEN
SHELL YEAH
AWESOMENESS
MONKEY DEVS
PLAY TO WIN
LDPLAYER
KIMCHI
SUSHI
FRIED RICE
ME AND THE BOYS
AFTER PLAYING SNAIL
HAPPY HOLIDAYZ
GIGASNAIL
SNAIL CHAD
BACK TO DECEMBER
EARTH WIND AND FIRE
TWO SNAIL JACKS
UNLEASH HELLAS
SEE YOU LATER
BEEG GAI PARK
SNAIL MINIONS
SKIBIDI SNAILER
TOILET BOWL
2 HANDS 2 POCKETS
ALMOST A SMILE
CHILLING
YOU CANT SEE ME
2023 SHOWING
2024 AROUND
NEW YEAR SAME SNAIL
HALF-ANNIVERSNAIRY
YOU EXPECTED A CODE
BUT IT WAS ME
ITS A NEW DAWN
SNAILRUNNER 2049
FEELSSNAILMAN
I RECEIVE BTADS
U RECEIVE FRAGS
SNAIL BEFORE 2023
SNAIL AFTER 2023
TIS A NEW DAY
IT A NEW LIFE
LIVE. SNAIL. REPEAT.
QUANTUM SNEAP
THE FOOD DOESNT
BOTHER ME ANYWAY
KEWL HAIRCUT
FASHION
ALL AT ONCE
EVERY SNAIL
PEACHES
PEACHES PEACHES
SHELL OF A RIDE
HIYAAA
MOUNTAIN MOVER
FREE REN
SHAMPOO
O CAPTAIN
MY CAPTAIN
SMOL PAWSON
MONKE
MADNESS?
THIS IS BHARATA
MONKE ATTACK
RAMEN
JUNE BUG
SNECTACULAR
RELEASE THE KRAKEN
SUMMER SCRAMBLE
EULA
EULAA
EUULA
YULA
YURA
YEULA
EULATAM
SHELLDIVERS
SNEMOCRACY
SURVEY100
SNURVEY200
SHURVEY300
SNAHRVEY800
PROSNERITY
MORBIN TIME
GONNA MORB
NAH
ID WIN
THINK SNAIL
THINK
MAYDAY
SNIBERTEA
A MUSICAL
SMILE
SOCIETY
SMIGY
PARASNYTE
I THOUGHT MY LIFE
WAS A COMEDY
SOLO LASERING
STATUE OF GAWD
APOC MAGE
ROGUE ASSET
BUT IT IS
SNARVELOUS
ESCARGOTDINAIRE
LUMACOSCO
SCHNECKENFEST
ESCARGANZA
NASCITA DI VENERE
CARACOTÁSTICO
Jean-Auguste-Dominique Ingres
LOGIN1000
LOGIN1001
LOGIN1212
14LOGIN14
LOG1N999
LOGIN202
LOGIN030
LOGIN4004
LOGIN5
LOGINSIX
LOGIN777
LOGIN888
1ST ANNIVERSARY
WOE
CODES BE UPON YE
JULY BUGS
I AM
THE PARLIAMENT
SNAILVERSE TRIO
IN YAMATO
SUMMER
SUMMER SUMMER
WHAT TIME IS IT
SUMMERTIME
SIGMA SNAIL
GRAVITY
SANZANG CROSSING
MT SPIRIT
SNAIL WILL PREVAIL
SNURVEY007
SURVEY007
HOW TO SPELL
QUESTIONNAIRE
THAT IS A LOT
OF RESPONSES
WE THANK YOU
ATHENA SINGS
SNEIYA SCREAMS
ALL YOUR CHAN-HEE
ARE BELONG TO US
BONKAI
JAIL TIME
SNELPER1
SNELPER2
SNELPER3
BUT A BEAST
IS IN THE HEART
DRAGON
RAWR
STARSCOURGE LUBU
SNELDEN RING
STRANGE KNOWLEDGE
HAS INCREASED
THE BEAUTY IS THERE
VIP777
HAPPYMASK
SADMASK
AUG BUGS
WAKE ME UP
ALWAYS HAS BEEN
GASTRONAUT
SHELLOWEEN
SHELLRAISER
RAYGUNDAM
RAYGUNGEON
FROM THE DARK
GHOULSTROPOD
ESCARGORE
MECHA SNAIL
IN PARIS
REDDIT1
REDDIT2
REDDIT3
REDDIT4
REDDIT5
REDDIT6
REDDIT7
REDDIT8
REDDIT9
REDDIT10THZ
CATHAY1
CATHAY2
Survey1
Survey2
Survey3
Survey4
Survey5
Survey6
Survey7THZ
I KANT WAKE UP
SAAAVE MEEE
BLACK SMYTH
WUKONG
MONKE STARE
MONKE AVOID
RAYGUNGIRL
JOJO REFERENCE
OLYMPICS
RAYBLASTER
RAYCANNON
RAYGUNNING
STONKS
NOT STONKS
CATHAYONE
CATHAYTWO
POLLING2024
IMPOSTER
IMPASTA
SUS
VENTING
MAKE A MANTIS
OUT OF YOU
RAYGUNNED
RAYGUNNER
ALFA WOLF
PICTURE PERFECT
OLYMPICS
MY TREE FRIEND
APRICOT SPRITE
ANNSERV1
ANNSERV2
ANNSERV3
OJT GAMER
NICE CHANNEL
SEPT BUGS
RAYGUN
SUBSCRIBE
OCT BUGS
THANKSABUNCH
THANKSATON
THANKSALOT
AI GETS BETTER
ZUCK GETS MORE HUMAN
YOU UNDERESTIMATE
MY POWA
FOR THANKSGIVING
ALL I WANT
IS U
SHELLSING
DRACULA
MOOO
DANG
MEMORY
REBOOT
</syntaxhighlight>

=== Codes that Expired, but were reactivated ===
This is just for tracking. If they are active, they will be listed in the Active Section
<syntaxhighlight lang="berry">
PARTNER
VIP777
SUMMER
SUBSCRIBE
</syntaxhighlight>

=== One Time Codes that are Expired ===
These were one time codes provided to various players for bug hunting, exceptional help, etc.  Only here for completeness.
<syntaxhighlight lang="berry">
DY5W7F54PTWKEQAB
4CTY8U7JD2ZBN9PL
E6MF9PNN2TFQAT3X
DXEFYDXYY8EBZG9Y
S4W9UJARNMSLVYGZ
LZGMR8F6FHBRU56D
</syntaxhighlight>
